name: Mount Logan Capital Inc.
business: Mount Logan Capital Inc. is an alternative asset management and insurance solutions company that manages public and private debt securities in North America and reinsures annuity products. It operates through two segments: Asset Management, which focuses on private credit across senior secured lending, asset-based finance, and related strategies, and Insurance Solutions, which reinsures multi-year guaranteed annuity (MYGA) products through its subsidiary Ability Insurance Company. The company generates recurring fee streams from asset management and spread income from insurance operations.

exposures.sentence: Formed in 2018, we are a publicly traded, alternative asset management and insurance solutions company that is focused on public and private debt securities in the North American market and the reinsurance of annuity products, primarily through our wholly-owned subsidiaries Mount Logan Management LLC ( ML Management ) and Ability Insurance Company, a Nebraska domiciled insurer ( Ability ), respectively.

catalysts.event: Business combination with 180 Degree Capital Corp.
catalysts.sentence: On September 12, 2025 (the Closing Date ), the Company completed a business combination pursuant to an Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated as of January 16, 2025 and amended as of July 6, 2025 and August 17, 2025.

catalysts.event: New reinsurance treaty with National Security Group (NSG) for MYGA.
catalysts.sentence: On March 31, 2025, Ability entered a new reinsurance treaty for additional MYGA with National Security Group ( NSG ), further diversifying its reinsurance partners.

On February 24, 2026, BCPL and ACIF announced that they have entered into an agreement under which ACIF will merge with and into BCPL, subject to approval by ACIF shareholders and the satisfaction of other closing conditions.

catalysts.event: OCIF asset acquisition of Yieldstreet Alternative Income Fund expected to close.
catalysts.sentence: On March 18, 2026, Opportunistic Credit Interval Fund ( OCIF ), a fund managed by ML Management, entered into definitive agreements to acquire the assets of Yieldstreet Alternative Income Fund ( YS AIF ) (the Asset Acquisition ).

tamClaims.claim: U.S. annuity premiums totaled $461.3 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, annuity premiums totaled $461.3 billion, up 6% year over year, accordingly to preliminary results from LIMRA s U.S. Individual Annuity Sales survey, which represents 92% of the U.S. annuity market.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. population over 65 years old is forecast to grow from 57.8 million in 2022 to 78.3 million in 20 years.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. population over 65 years old is forecast to grow from 57.8 million in 2022 to an estimated 78.3 million in the next 20 years, according to the U.S. Census Bureau, Population Estimates and Projections.
